title: OpenAI releases GPT-5.5, bringing company one step closer to an AI ‘superapp’
summary: OpenAI has released GPT-5.5, its latest AI model with significantly expanded capabilities across multiple domains. This advancement brings the company closer to its goal of creating an AI superapp capable of handling diverse tasks seamlessly.
content: OpenAI says its latest model offers increased capabilities across a broad variety of categories.

zh.title: OpenAI发布GPT-5.5，进一步接近AI"超级应用"目标
zh.summary: OpenAI发布了最新AI模型GPT-5.5，该模型在多个领域的能力得到显著扩展。这一进展使公司更接近其创建能够无缝处理多样化任务的AI超级应用的目标。

title: Spirit is broken
summary: Spirit Airlines, the seventh-largest U.S. carrier, has requested a federal bailout after years of financial losses and two bankruptcies, exacerbated by a $360 million increase in fuel costs from geopolitical tensions. The sudden distress call suggests the airline's earlier recovery timeline may be collapsing.
content:
The bright yellow livery of Spirit Airlines may soon disappear from the skies. The country's seventh-largest airline has been in financial trouble for years: It hasn't turned a profit since 2019 and filed for bankruptcy twice in the last two years. Despite all that, its leaders predicted that the airline could exit bankruptcy and return to profitability as early as 2027. It just needed time and a little stability to do so.
That time may have run out. On Monday, April 20th, Spirit approached the government to ask for a federal bailout. The sudden rise in fuel prices caused by the war in Iran will add an estimated $360 million in unexpected c …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 精神航空公司陷入困境
zh.summary: 美国第七大航空公司精神航空公司在多年的财务亏损和两次破产后，由于地缘政治紧张局势导致燃料成本增加3.6亿美元，请求联邦救助。这一突然的求助信号表明该航空公司早期的恢复时间表可能正在崩溃。

title: Anthropic’s Mythos breach was humiliating
summary: Unauthorized users gained access to Anthropic's Claude Mythos AI model despite the company's strict rollout controls and public claims about its dangerous capabilities. The security breach undermines Anthropic's reputation as an AI safety-focused company.
content:
Anthropic's tightly controlled rollout of Claude Mythos has taken an awkward turn. After spending weeks insisting the AI model is so capable at cybersecurity that it is too dangerous to release publicly, it appears the model fell into the wrong hands anyway. 
According to Bloomberg, a "small group of unauthorized users" has had access to Mythos - whose existence was first revealed in a leak - since the day Anthropic announced plans to offer it to a select group of companies for testing. Anthropic says it is investigating. That's a rough look for a company that has built its brand on taking AI safety seriously while touting the cybersecurity …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Anthropic的Mythos漏洞令人感到羞辱
zh.summary: 尽管公司采取了严格的推出控制和关于其危险能力的公开声明，但未经授权的用户仍获得了对Anthropic的Claude Mythos AI模型的访问权限。这次安全漏洞破坏了Anthropic作为AI安全聚焦公司的声誉。

title: Meta to cut 10% of jobs, or 8,000 employees, report says
summary: Meta plans to lay off 10% of its workforce, affecting approximately 8,000 employees, with cuts beginning May 20. The layoffs represent a significant workforce reduction as the company restructures operations.
content: According to an internal memo, Meta plans to begin its sweeping layoffs on May 20.

zh.title: Meta将裁员10%，约8000名员工，报告显示
zh.summary: Meta计划裁员10%，约8000名员工受影响，裁员将于5月20日开始。这次裁员代表着公司在重组运营中进行的重大人员缩减。

title: OpenAI says its new GPT-5.5 model is more efficient and better at coding
summary: OpenAI's GPT-5.5 model excels at coding, debugging, research, and multi-tool workflows, allowing users to delegate complex tasks without micromanaging each step. The model represents a shift toward more autonomous AI assistants that can plan, verify, and adapt independently.
content:
OpenAI just announced its new GPT-5.5 model, which the company calls its "smartest and most intuitive to use model yet, and the next step toward a new way of getting work done on a computer." OpenAI just released GPT-5.4 last month, but says that the new GPT-5.5 "excels" at tasks like writing and debugging code, doing research online, making spreadsheets and documents, and doing that work across different tools.
"Instead of carefully managing every step, you can give GPT-5.5 a messy, multi-part task and trust it to plan, use tools, check its work, navigate through ambiguity, and keep going," according to OpenAI. The company also notes that  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: OpenAI表示其新的GPT-5.5模型更高效，编码能力更强
zh.summary: OpenAI的GPT-5.5模型在编码、调试、研究和多工具工作流方面表现出色，允许用户委托复杂任务而无需逐步微观管理。该模型代表了向更加自主的AI助手转变，这些助手可以独立规划、验证和适应。

title: Ikea’s new inflatable chair doesn’t look like an inflatable chair
summary: Ikea is previewing an innovative inflatable easy chair as part of a new experimental collection launching in May, featuring fabric-wrapped air chambers and a steel frame. The design demonstrates how modern engineering can elevate inflatable furniture beyond the cheap, lumpy products of the 1990s.
content:
The PS 2026 easy chair is made from two fabric-wrapped air chambers with a steel frame. | Image: Ikea	

Ikea shared a sneak preview of three pieces from a new experimental collection, set to be fully revealed at an annual company event on May 13th. One of the pieces is an inflatable chair that looks like a far cry from the cheap and lumpy inflatable furniture popularized in the '90s.
This isn't the first time Ikea's designers have experimented with inflatable furniture. The Ikea Museum website has an entire page dedicated to what it calls an "idea that fell flat." In 2000 the furniture maker introduced its inflatable Rolig easy chair and Innerlig sofa but they were expensive and suffered from leaky valves, resulting in both pieces slowly defl …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 宜家的新充气椅看起来不像充气椅
zh.summary: 宜家正在预览一款创新的充气扶手椅，作为将于5月推出的新实验系列的一部分，采用布包裹的气室和钢框架。该设计展示了现代工程如何能够将充气家具提升到超越1990年代廉价、笨重产品水平的高度。

title: Great news, the Moto G Stylus is no longer teeming with bloatware
summary: Motorola's 2026 Moto G Stylus offers an active stylus, headphone jack, microSD support, and clean software, addressing previous bloatware complaints. The mid-range phone stands out for retaining features many manufacturers have abandoned.
content:
A phone for people who like pens.	

The 2026 edition of Motorola's stylus phone is plenty appealing. 
My review unit is a charming lilac color, has a pleasantly textured back panel, and includes a MicroSD slot and what might be the last surviving headphone jack on a mainstream phone sold in North America. The namesake stylus is no longer just a fancy plastic stick, it's active and comes with some neat tricks. 
Motorola Moto G Stylus (2026)
The latest version of Motorola's stylus phone comes with an active pen, as well as old favorites like a headphone jack and MicroSD support.


Score: 6

ProsCons


Active stylus
Headphone jack! MicroSD card support!
IP68/69 rated
Big screen for the p …



Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 好消息，Moto G Stylus 不再充满预装软件
zh.summary: 摩托罗拉的2026年Moto G Stylus配备主动笔、耳机接口、microSD卡支持和纯净软件，解决了之前的预装软件问题。这款中端手机因保留许多制造商已放弃的功能而脱颖而出。

title: Microsoft brings Xbox back, scraps Microsoft Gaming
summary: Xbox CEO Asha Sharma announced that Microsoft is reverting to "Xbox" as the identity for its gaming division, abandoning the "Microsoft Gaming" rebrand. The move signals a strategic refocus on the iconic Xbox brand.
content:
Xbox CEO Asha Sharma has had a busy week. Sharma held an internal town hall with Xbox employees today, just days after announcing an Xbox Game Pass price cut, commenting on the status of the Xbox mobile store, and teasing a mysterious Xbox and Discord partnership. One of the items on the agenda for the employee all-hands was scrapping Microsoft Gaming.
Sources familiar with the meeting tell me that Sharma announced that Microsoft is returning to using Xbox for its gaming division, instead of Microsoft Gaming. "Xbox needs to be our identity," said Sharma, noting that Microsoft Gaming was a departure from that.
Microsoft originally switched  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 微软重振Xbox品牌，放弃Microsoft Gaming名称
zh.summary: Xbox首席执行官Asha Sharma宣布，微软正在将"Xbox"作为其游戏部门的身份标识恢复，放弃"Microsoft Gaming"的重新品牌化。此举表明了对标志性Xbox品牌的战略重新关注。

title: Apple's M4 Mac mini, including the $599 one, is gradually becoming impossible to buy
summary: Apple's M4 Mac mini, even the entry-level $599 model, is becoming difficult to purchase, possibly due to an upcoming refresh, supply constraints, or new AI agent development. The shortage suggests either planned product transitions or unexpected demand pressures.
content: Pending refresh? RAM shortage? AI agents? There are many possible explanations.

zh.title: 苹果M4 Mac mini（包括599美元的版本）正逐渐成为无法购买的产品
zh.summary: 苹果的M4 Mac mini，即使是入门级的599美元型号，也变得难以购买，可能是由于即将推出的新版本、供应限制或新的AI代理开发。这种短缺表明要么是计划中的产品更新，要么是出乎意料的需求压力。

title: Keychron’s customizable V1 mechanical keyboard is back down to $45
summary: The Keychron V1 mechanical keyboard is on sale for $44.99 through April 25 at Woot, matching its all-time low, and offers hot-swappable switches and customization features typically found in pricier boards. The keyboard delivers premium typing experience for budget-conscious users.
content:
If you’ve ever wished your laptop keyboard was better tailored to your workflow, the Keychron V1 is a solid upgrade. It doesn’t cost as much as most other mechanical keyboards, but it still offers a lot of the same flexibility. And now through April 25th, you can buy the wired board for $44.99 ($30 off) with red switches from Woot, matching its all-time low price. Other models are also on sale at Amazon and directly from Keychron for about $25 more.
Keychron V1

Where to Buy:

 $84.99 $66.29 at Amazon
 $84.99 $69.99 at Keychron
 $74.99 $44.99 at Woot

The V1 includes features you don’t always get at this price. It nearly matches the typing experience of more expensive keyboards, offering a sturdy build that feels nice to type on. The keyboard also offers a small 75 percent layout that mimics a laptop-style keyboard without the numpad.
It’s also customizable. The V1 supports hot-swappable switches, so you’re not stuck with the red ones that come with this discounted model and can easily change how it feels later on. It also works with VIA software, letting you customize keys and create shortcuts that fit how you actually use your keyboard, whether that’s for work or play. You also get customizable RGB backlighting if you want to add a bit more style to your work setup.
Beyond that, the keyboard offers double-shot PBT keycaps that ​​are more durable than what you’ll find on cheaper boards, so they won’t wear down quickly. It also works with both Mac and Windows right out of the box. A switch on the back lets you toggle easily between the two.
More deals and discounts
Skullcandy’s Method 360 ANC are on sale for $77.99 ($52 off) at Amazon and Best Buy, which is $3 shy of their all-time low price. Created in partnership with Bose, the budget-friendly wireless earbuds feature sound tuning alongside a secure, comfortable fit, thanks to three ear gel and fin sizes that help block out noise. A four-mic hybrid ANC system helps tune out distractions, while a Stay-Aware mode le

zh.title: Keychron可定制V1机械键盘降价至45美元
zh.summary: Keychron V1机械键盘在Woot上以44.99美元的价格促销至4月25日，创历史低价，提供通常在更昂贵键盘中才能找到的热插拔开关和定制功能。该键盘为预算有限的用户提供高级打字体验。

title: US Space Command: Russia is now operationalizing co-orbital ASAT weapons
summary: The U.S. Space Command reports that Russia is operationalizing co-orbital anti-satellite weapons positioned to threaten American high-value satellites in orbit. This development escalates the space arms race and poses a direct threat to critical U.S. space infrastructure.
content: "They’re putting operational systems up within orbit reach of our high-value satellites."

zh.title: 美国太空司令部：俄罗斯现在正在开发共轨反卫星武器
zh.summary: 美国太空司令部报告称，俄罗斯正在开发共轨反卫星武器，这些武器位置可对美国轨道上的高价值卫星构成威胁。这一发展升级了太空军备竞赛，对美国关键太空基础设施构成直接威胁。

title: Bluesky now supports better quality photos
summary: Bluesky has increased photo quality support, raising the maximum file size to 2MB and resolution to 4000x4000 pixels. The improvement allows users to share higher-fidelity images on the platform.
content: The max size is now 2MB and max resolution is 4000x4000.

zh.title: Bluesky现在支持更高质量的照片
zh.summary: Bluesky提高了照片质量支持，将最大文件大小提高到2MB，分辨率提高到4000x4000像素。这一改进允许用户在该平台上分享更高保真度的图像。

title: Microsoft offers buyout for up to 7% of U.S. employees
summary: Microsoft is offering voluntary retirement buyouts to eligible U.S. employees with a combined age and years of service totaling 70 or more. The program provides an alternative to involuntary layoffs while reducing workforce costs.
content: If a worker's years of service at Microsoft plus their age equals 70 or more, they will be eligible for a voluntary retirement buyout.

zh.title: 微软为合格美国员工提供最高达7%的买断方案
zh.summary: 微软向符合条件的美国员工提供自愿退休买断，条件是年龄和服务年限的总和达到70或以上。该项目提供了一个替代非自愿裁员的选择，同时降低劳动力成本。

title: Apple stops weirdly storing data that let cops spy on Signal chats
summary: Apple has fixed a security vulnerability that stored Signal chat data even after the app was deleted, potentially enabling law enforcement surveillance. Signal praised Apple for addressing the privacy flaw and removing an unintended surveillance vector.
content: Signal “very happy” Apple fixed bug storing private chats after app was deleted.

zh.title: 苹果停止存储允许警察监视Signal聊天的数据
zh.summary: 苹果修复了一个安全漏洞，该漏洞在应用删除后仍存储Signal聊天数据，可能导致执法部门监控。Signal赞扬苹果解决了隐私漏洞并消除了一个无意的监视向量。

title: Eight months early and under budget, the Roman Telescope is ready to launch
summary: NASA's Roman Space Telescope is ready for launch eight months ahead of schedule and under budget, having repurposed existing spy satellite hardware for infrared astronomical observations. The accelerated timeline and cost savings represent a significant achievement in space telescope development.
content: Spy satellite hardware has been repurposed to scan the Universe in the infrared.

zh.title: 提前八个月、预算内完成，罗曼太空望远镜已准备好发射
zh.summary: 美国航空航天局的罗曼太空望远镜已准备就绪，比计划提前八个月发射，预算也未超支，它利用现有的间谍卫星硬件进行红外天文观测。加快的时间表和成本节约代表了太空望远镜开发的重大成就。

title: Surveillance vendors caught abusing access to telcos to track people’s phone locations, researchers say
summary: The Citizen Lab discovered surveillance vendors exploiting cellular network access to track people's phone locations worldwide. This vulnerability reveals how telco infrastructure can be abused by third parties to conduct surveillance at scale.
content: The Citizen Lab found two separate surveillance vendors abusing the backbone of cellular networks to spy on several victims across the world.

zh.title: 监控供应商滥用对电信公司的访问权限追踪人们的手机位置,研究人员表示
zh.summary: 公民实验室发现监控供应商利用蜂窝网络访问权限在全球范围内追踪人们的手机位置。这一漏洞揭示了电信基础设施如何被第三方滥用以进行大规模监控。

title: Beehiiv rolls out new creator tools, including webinars and customizable paywalls
summary: Beehiiv is expanding beyond its newsletter platform with new webinar and customizable paywall features. The move positions the company as a comprehensive creator tools platform serving a broader audience.
content: Beehiiv is clearly done being just a newsletter platform based on today's launch of a new webinar feature, customizable paywalls, and more.

zh.title: Beehiiv推出新的创作者工具,包括网络研讨会和可定制的付费墙
zh.summary: Beehiiv通过新的网络研讨会和可定制付费墙功能扩展其新闻通讯平台。这一举措将该公司定位为为更广泛受众服务的综合创作者工具平台。

title: Tim Cook’s departure is the start of a new era at Apple
summary: Apple CEO Tim Cook is stepping down this September and will be replaced by John Ternus, the head of hardware. The transition marks the end of an era where executives hired during Steve Jobs' tenure led the company.
content:
Apple is about to become a very different company. This September, Apple CEO Tim Cook is stepping down and will be replaced by John Ternus, the current head of hardware. But the shift is bigger than just a CEO transition - it's the most significant move yet into a world where Apple's executive team isn't handpicked by Steve Jobs.
With the departure of Cook, who became CEO in 2011, the list of leaders who were in Jobs' inner circle is dwindling. There's still Apple's senior vice president of services, Eddy Cue, who joined in 1989, and has said that Jobs was like a "family member" to him. There's also longtime marketing exec Phil Schiller, wh …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 蒂姆·库克的离职标志着苹果新时代的开始
zh.summary: 苹果首席执行官蒂姆·库克将于今年9月下台,由硬件主管约翰·特努斯取代。这一过渡标志着由史蒂夫·乔布斯任期内聘用的高管领导公司的时代结束。

title: Govee’s new colorful outdoor lights are its first with solar power
summary: Govee announced its first solar-powered outdoor lights, featuring a 6W solar panel with integrated 4,800mAh battery, priced at $99.99. The string lights include eight color-changing bulbs on a 34-foot cable and can run up to 13 hours on a full charge.
content:
Eight bulbs are powered by a rechargeable battery built into a 6W solar panel. | Image: Govee	

Govee announced its first solar-powered lights today. They include a 6W panel with an integrated 4,800mAh battery that can be recharged with a single full day of sunlight (though if the weather's looking a little overcast, you can still charge it over USB-C). The Govee Outdoor Solar String Lights are available now through the company's online store and Amazon for $99.99 and feature eight color-changing bulbs on a 34-foot cable.
On a full charge the bulbs will run for up to 13 hours, Govee claims, but that's with their brightness limited to just 10 lumens. The bulbs have a maximum brightness of up to 50 lumens, but you can expect the battery …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Govee的新型彩色户外灯是其首款太阳能产品
zh.summary: Govee推出了首款太阳能户外灯，配备6W太阳能电池板和集成4,800mAh电池，价格为$99.99。这款串灯包括34英尺电缆上的8个变色灯泡，满电后可运行长达13小时。

title: Microsoft launches ‘vibe working’ in Word, Excel, and PowerPoint
summary: Microsoft is rolling out Agent Mode in Office apps like Word, Excel, and PowerPoint, a more capable version of Copilot that can take action on documents. The feature represents a significant advancement in AI capabilities within productivity software.
content:
Microsoft is rolling out a new Agent Mode inside Office apps like Word, Excel, and PowerPoint this week. Previously described by Microsoft as "vibe working," the Agent Mode is a more powerful version of the Copilot experience in Office that Microsoft has been trying to sell to businesses.
"When we first shipped Copilot, foundation models were not powerful enough to use Copilot to command the applications," admits Sumit Chauhan, corporate vice president of Microsoft's Office Product Group. "This meant Copilot was a passive partner in documents: it could answer questions but missed the mark when it was asked to take action on the canvas direc …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 微软在Word、Excel和PowerPoint中推出代理模式
zh.summary: 微软正在Word、Excel和PowerPoint等Office应用中推出代理模式，这是Copilot的更强大版本，可以对文档执行操作。该功能代表了生产力软件中AI功能的重大进步。

title: Meta will now allow parents to see the topics their child discussed with Meta AI
summary: Meta is introducing a new parental control feature allowing parents to view the topics their children discuss with Meta AI. Topics are categorized into areas like School, Entertainment, Health, and Travel.
content: Topics can range from "School," "Entertainment," and "Lifestyle" to "Travel," "Writing," and "Health and Wellbeing," among others, Meta says.

zh.title: Meta现在允许家长查看其子女与Meta AI讨论的主题
zh.summary: Meta推出了一项新的家长控制功能，允许家长查看其子女与Meta AI讨论的主题。主题被分类为学校、娱乐、健康和旅行等领域。

title: Honor’s new phones look like iPhones for Android
summary: Honor released the Honor 600 and 600 Pro phones with design aesthetics strikingly similar to iPhones, positioning them as "accessible flagships." Both models feature IP69K water resistance, OLED displays, and 6,400mAh batteries.
content:
Honor has announced the 600 and 600 Pro, which it calls "accessible flagships," and they look… familiar. Especially in that orange.
The Pro makes the iPhone comparison especially obvious thanks to its triple rear camera - it even has the same flash layout - while the 600 is just a hair subtler because it drops the Pro's 3.5x telephoto lens. Honor actually pulled the same move with last year's iPhone Air-inspired Honor 500, but that phone only launched in Asia.
Both phones have IP69K water-resistance ratings (a tougher rating that covers testing with water jets closer to the phone), midsize 6.57-inch OLED displays, and big 6,400mAh batterie …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 荣耀新手机看起来像iPhone的安卓版本
zh.summary: 荣耀发布了荣耀600和600 Pro手机，设计美学与iPhone惊人相似，将其定位为"平价旗舰机"。两款机型都具有IP69K防水性能、OLED屏幕和6400mAh电池。

title: India’s app market is booming — but global platforms are capturing most of the gains
summary: India's non-gaming app market is experiencing rapid growth driven by streaming and AI, but global platforms are capturing most revenue gains despite strong user growth. The disparity highlights challenges for local developers profiting from India's expanding digital economy.
content: Non-gaming apps, led by streaming and AI, are driving growth, even as India's spending per user lags global peers.

zh.title: 印度应用市场繁荣——但全球平台获得了大部分收益
zh.summary: 印度非游戏应用市场在流媒体和人工智能的驱动下经历快速增长，但全球平台正在获得大部分收入收益，尽管用户增长强劲。这种差异突出了本地开发者从印度不断扩大的数字经济中获利的挑战。

title: Shade lands $14M to let creative teams search their video libraries in plain English
summary: Shade raised $14 million to provide creative teams with AI-powered natural language search for video libraries. The startup has developed proprietary filesystem technology enabling direct file streaming to local drives.
content: Shade has its own filesystem that lets you "stream" files directly to your local drive

zh.title: Shade获得1400万美元融资让创意团队用英文搜索视频库
zh.summary: Shade获得1400万美元融资为创意团队提供由人工智能驱动的自然语言视频库搜索功能。该初创公司开发了专有文件系统技术，可实现本地驱动器的直接文件流传输。

title: The Iranian women Trump ‘saved’ from execution are simultaneously real and AI-manipulated
summary: President Trump claimed to have secured the release of eight Iranian women facing execution, but photos he posted were widely criticized as AI-generated. The incident highlights the intersection of AI-generated imagery and political claims.
content:
On Wednesday, President Donald Trump claimed to have secured the release of eight Iranian women condemned to execution for protesting the regime. 
Only the night before, he had posted on Truth Social about the imminent executions of these women, quoting a screenshot that included a collage of eight glamorously backlit, soft-focus portraits. The photos of the women were immediately accused of being AI-generated. "Trump is begging Iranian leaders to not execute 8 AI-generated women. This is the funniest thing I've ever seen," said one viral X post.


Trump is begging Iranian leaders to not execute 8 AI-generated women. This is the funniest th …


Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 特朗普"拯救"的伊朗妇女既真实又被AI操纵
zh.summary: 特朗普总统声称已确保八名面临死刑的伊朗妇女获释，但他发布的照片被广泛批评为AI生成的。这一事件突出了AI生成图像和政治言论的交集。
